privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real digital forensic test data (DFTT #7 NTFS Undelete test image) downloaded from SourceForge and placed at /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd. The task instructions accurately reflect the expected case name (QA_Crossval_2024), report output paths for TSK and Autopsy inventories (/home/ga/Reports/crossval_tsk_inventory.txt, /home/ga/Reports/crossval_autopsy_inventory.txt), and the final cross-validation report (/home/ga/Reports/crossval_report.txt). The setup script dynamically generates the ground truth file at /tmp/crossval_gt.json using The Sleuth Kit (TSK) tools, and the export script successfully writes the evaluation result to /tmp/crossval_result.json. All metadata claims are explicitly verified against the task scripts.
